title: Kanban Plan — ct-cognize parallel preflight + robust fallback

planning_session.author: pi-agent
planning_session.goal: Fix ct-cognize agent auto-selection so preflight runs in parallel with minimal prompts and runtime failures fallback to next available agent.

DONE.task: Implement parallel agent preflight race with minimal prompts and per-agent preflight args
DONE.notes: Auto mode should probe all agents concurrently and pick first successful response. Preflight prompt must explicitly require no tool usage.
DONE.status_note: Implemented parallel_preflight() with completion-order selection and preflight prompt: "Ответь одним словом: ok. Не используй инструменты."; updated per-agent minimal preflight args (pi includes --no-tools).

DONE.task: Add runtime fallback chain after selected agent failure (including timeout)
DONE.notes: If first-picked agent fails, try remaining preflight-ready agents before abort.
DONE.status_note: Implemented auto runtime fallback in cognize(): if primary agent fails (runtime/timeout/parse), tool retries remaining preflight-ready agents before aborting.

DONE.task: Add/adjust tests for parallel selection and runtime fallback
DONE.notes: Cover first-responder selection and fallback on RuntimeError/TimeoutExpired.
DONE.status_note: Extended tests/test_ct_cognize.py: added preflight ordering tests and runtime fallback integration test; updated integration monkeypatches to select_agent_chain.

DONE.task: Run targeted test suite and CLI smoke checks
DONE.notes: pytest tests/test_ct_cognize.py plus focused CLI command verification.
DONE.status_note: Verification passed: pytest tests/test_ct_cognize.py -q (31 passed), real CLI smoke with auto mode, plus deterministic fake-agent fallback smoke (gemini fail -> qwen success).

acceptance_criteria: ct-cognize auto mode preflight probes agents in parallel and selects first successful responder
ct-cognize retries remaining candidates if chosen agent fails at runtime
Timeout and runtime errors no longer stop auto mode before trying available fallbacks
